visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a split screen. On the left, a person is seen dipping bread into a liquid, resulting in a stretchy, cheese-like texture. On the right, the main character, a woman with long dark wavy hair wearing a purple fuzzy sweater, holds a small yellow stick-shaped packet. The indoor setting is brightly lit with soft shadows. (2) The woman holds up two blue packages of 'Fresh Milk Bread' to the camera, gesturing animatedly while speaking. She is in an indoor room with a white chair and neutral-toned furniture in the background. (3) A large clear glass bowl is placed on a table. The woman's hands are seen opening the bread packaging and placing three swirly pieces of bread into the bowl. The lighting is focused on the table surface. (4) The woman pours white milk from a blue and white carton directly over the bread in the bowl. She looks into the camera with an expectant expression. (5) Using a fork, she pokes and presses the milk-soaked bread. A magnified insert shot appears, highlighting the bread's transformation into a gooey, translucent state. The woman's facial expression shows wide-eyed surprise. (6) The woman uses the fork to lift a portion of the soaked bread, demonstrating its extreme stretchiness. She takes a bite and reacts with various facial expressions, including smiles and focused chewing. The background remains a consistent indoor home environment. (7) She continues to eat the bread and talk to the camera, gesturing towards the bowl. Numerous text overlays appear at the bottom and top of the frame throughout.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 確定沒加起司或加熱!! 韓網爆紅拉絲麵包. [Variety]: 從大陸紅到韓國? (2) [Subtitle]: 麵包直接變成「莫扎瑞拉起司」?! [Variety]: 實驗歐膩. (3) [Subtitle]: 買好了. (4) [Subtitle]: 好多韓國網紅們都吃這個. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後大家都用這種麵包 (當初從大陸開始爆紅). (6) [Subtitle]: 直接開箱!!! (7) [Subtitle]: 想像中的一般牛奶麵包味道. (8) [Subtitle]: 韓國有一個起司麵包. [Variety]: No.1 DOUBLE CHEESE. (9) [Subtitle]: 跟那個味道有一點像. (10) [Subtitle]: 有一點起司香味. (11) [Subtitle]: (過期了). (12) [Subtitle]: 過三天而已 (自己吃沒關係). (13) [Subtitle]: 應該還行. [Variety]: 吃 吧. (14) [Subtitle]: (沒有過期). (15) [Subtitle]: 這樣等10分鐘以上就好! (16) [Subtitle]: (順便聊最近的事情). (17) [Subtitle]: 我現在後面沒什麼東西是吧. (18) [Subtitle]: 我在準備搬家. (19) [Subtitle]: 下一次的時候我搬好新家了. (20) [Subtitle]: 請多期待以後的新背景. [Variety]: ! 好像起司. 拉~. 如何. (21) [Subtitle]: 哇 好甜喔. (22) [Subtitle]: 口感很像在吃棉花.... (23) [Subtitle]: 剛剛單吃這個麵包的時候覺得沒有甜. (24) [Subtitle]: 就是起司麵包的味道. (25) [Subtitle]: 加了牛奶之後呢. (26) [Subtitle]: 爆甜!!! (27) [Subtitle]: 好像直接加了煉乳之類. (28) [Subtitle]: 這口感卻是好特別. (29) [Subtitle]: 真的很像在吃棉花. (30) [Subtitle]: 有有人這樣吃過嗎? (31) [Subtitle]: 我比較好奇加韓國香蕉牛奶的話，會變得如何!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, 1 female visible in the introductory split-screen clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, dark, wavy hair, wearing a vibrant purple fuzzy or mohair-style sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, well-lit indoor room featuring a white gaming or office chair, a desk area, and soft room lighting. Some shelves and home decor items are partially visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female narration begins over an upbeat, bright synthesized pop BGM at 128 BPM. The vocal delivery is fast-paced and cheerful. (2) A crisp plastic crinkling sound effect is heard as the bread packaging is opened. The BGM remains steady in the background. (3) The distinct sound of liquid pouring smoothly into a container occurs, followed by light splashing as a fork interacts with the contents. (4) A high-pitched 'ding' SFX marks a specific on-screen highlight. The narration pitch rises slightly to indicate excitement. (5) A cartoonish 'boing' or stretching sound effect is audible as the gooey bread is lifted. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal background noise. (6) Soft sounds of chewing and vocalized reactions ('Mmm') are interspersed with the continuous high-tempo BGM. The track ends with a short fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a creator trying a viral social media food trend—soaking milk bread in milk to achieve a cheese-like texture—and provides a first-hand review of the resulting taste and mouthfeel.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on testing a general internet trend rather than promoting a specific product or brand, despite clear branding on the milk carton used.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging, social-media-native video with dense editing, frequent sound effects, and vibrant visual colors designed to capture attention quickly and maintain a high arousal level.
